benefits.description: works extremely well on women, described as constantly 70% aroused

side_effects.description: potential nausea with higher doses or without eating; recommended zofran access
brain fog with higher doses or without eating

protocol_notes: Female user, 41 years old. Started with very low dose (1mg). Notes difference in effect timing between men and women. PT-141 increases libido from brain rather than acting as vasodilator. Nausea and brain fog resolve while libido effects persist.
